category_sources: Official ECMWF GitHub repository describes eccodes as ECMWF's GRIB and BUFR decoding/encoding library.
source_facts.description says ecCodes decodes and encodes GRIB 1/2 and BUFR 3/4 meteorological message formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ECMWF ecCodes page; project branding uses ecCodes.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official ECMWF Confluence ecCodes documentation landing page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ECMWF GitHub organization lists ecmwf/eccodes as the ecCodes repository.
tags_sources: Official ECMWF repository identifies the project as an ECMWF data-format library.
source_facts.description names GRIB and BUFR encode/decode support.
